title: mentha suaveolens var. oblongifolia
intro: Mentha suaveolens var. oblongifolia, also known as Sweet Marjoram, is a subspecies of the mint family with distinctive leaves and a sweet, pine-like fragrance. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and relieve pain. The health benefits of Sweet Marjoram include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Sweet Marjoram can be found in teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, calm the mind, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues.
